function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap with / tree, root AGENTS.MD, and context. Inspected 99_system before task work, then read nested AGENTS.MD files for 50_finance and 50_finance/invoices. Used exact invoice records and exact line-item values.
function.outcome_justification: The exact service line appears in two invoice records issued on 2026-03-23 and 2026-03-29. Their line_eur values are 780 and 390 respectively, and both dates are since the beginning of March 2026, so the total is 1170.
